General.Name: Butong Group
General.Description: Butong Group through its subsidiaries, engages in the designing, manufacturing, selling and research and development of nursery products. The company offers travel gears, such as strollers, car seats and baby carriers; sleep gears including cribs, pajamas and pillows; feeding gears consist of highchairs and tablewares; baby care products comprising diapers and wipes. It also engages in e-commerce business, marketing and promotion and aftersales services. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
